creator: josh@zipperup.org
text:
xinetd port is out-of-date. master site is now at xinetd-2.1.8.6b6. In
	addition, the start-up script does not record the pid of the xinetd
	process.

Fix: Update Makefile and files/md5 to reflect new distfile. 

	In addition, the following patch modifies ${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/xinetd.sh to
	record the pid of the xinetd process in /var/run/xinetd.pid

How-To-Repeat: 
	make the port. Fails on fetch.
